mapper.sql: id, category_code, name, icon, color, description, group_code, sort_no, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.select: select from cook_categories where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
select from cook_categories where category_code = #{categoryCode} and deleted_at is null limit 1
select count(1) from cook_categories where category_code = #{categoryCode} and status = 'enabled' and deleted_at is null
mapper.insert: insert into cook_categories (category_code, name, icon, color, description, group_code, sort_no, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{categoryCode}, #{name}, #{icon}, #{color}, #{description}, #{groupCode}, #{sortNo}, #{status}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp)
mapper.update: update cook_categories set name = #{name}, icon = #{icon}, color = #{color}, description = #{description}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, status = #{status}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_categories set deleted_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
